description: Connection lifecycle: hooks on connect/disconnect, failure reporting, reconnection. The client must stay alive through all of it.

scenarios.name: connected and disconnected hooks fire; the client survives a server drop

steps.note: liveness: the client still responds after the drop

scenarios.name: a refused connection is reported and the client stays alive
/reconnect dials the last address
init_lua: rune.hooks.on('connected', function() n = n + 1; rune.echo('E2E-CONNECTED-' .. n) end)

steps.note: sync: the drop is fully processed before reconnecting
